parameters.name: messages
parameters.value:
=[{"role":"system","content":"You are an expert at writing AI voice agent system prompts in Italian for business automation. Write natural, professional Italian."},{"role":"user","content":"Write a complete VAPI voice agent system prompt in Italian for this business:

Business name: {{ $('Webhook Trigger').item.json.body.business_name }}
Industry: {{ $('Webhook Trigger').item.json.body.plan }}
Agent name: Sofia

The agent must:
1. Answer calls professionally in Italian
2. Book appointments and check availability
3. Answer FAQs about the business
4. Reactivate inactive clients
5. Escalate complex issues to a human

Return ONLY the system prompt text, nothing else."}]
